'''koyafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:piccata|piccata]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-y-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:piccata|piccata]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| koyafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || koyafithi || koyafiji || koyafishi || koyafiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || koyafuthu || koyafuju || koyafushu || koyafuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || koyafuthu || koyafuju || koyafushu || koyafuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || koyafufthuf || koyafufjuf || koyafufshuf || koyafufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || koyafethe || koyafeje || koyafeshe || koyafeke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || koyafotho || koyafojo || koyafosho || koyafoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || koyafotho || koyafojo || koyafosho || koyafoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || koyafofthof || koyafofjof || koyafofshof || koyafofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || koyafïfthïf || koyafïfjïf || koyafïfshïf || koyafïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || koyafïfthïf || koyafïfjïf || koyafïfshïf || koyafïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || koyafïfthïf || koyafïfjïf || koyafïfshïf || koyafïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || koyafïfthïf || koyafïfjïf || koyafïfshïf || koyafïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || koyafæthæ || koyafæjæ || koyafæshæ || koyafækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || koyafatha || koyafaja || koyafasha || koyafaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || koyafatha || koyafaja || koyafasha || koyafaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || koyafafthaf || koyafafjaf || koyafafshaf || koyafafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || koyafasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || koyafshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || koyafroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || koyafmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || koyafyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gokoyafnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gokoyafnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gokoyafnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gokoyafnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || koyayafasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || koyayafshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || koyayafroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || koyayafmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || koyayafyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gokoyayafnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gokoyayafnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gokoyayafnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gokoyayafnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || keyæfasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || keyæfshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || keyæfroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || keyæfmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || keyæfyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gokeyæfnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gokeyæfnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gokeyæfnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gokeyæfnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || koyfafasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || koyfafshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || koyfafroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || koyfafmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || koyfafyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gokoyfafnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gokoyfafnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gokoyfafnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gokoyfafnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
